title: Project Management
description: Manage project information and configuration scope
confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete project "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

sections.basicDescription: Start with the project name, internal alias and ownership details.
sections.seoDescription: Keep domain, content entry and search-facing copy aligned in one place.
sections.brandDescription: Upload the visuals used in navigation and browser chrome so the project feels consistent.
sections.complianceDescription: Collect filing details and third-party scripts together to reduce release-day misses.

hints.title: This is the display name most teammates will see across the admin.
hints.name: Use a stable English or pinyin alias so scripts, URLs and internal docs stay readable.
hints.description: A short positioning summary helps the team understand the project at a glance.
hints.author: Set the current owner or responsible team to make handoffs easier later.
hints.domain: Use the main production domain so environment setup stays aligned.
hints.postUrl: If content has a shared entry URL, document it here for editors and developers.
hints.metaDescription: This maps to the project summary and is useful for search and sharing snippets.
hints.keywords: Comma-separated keywords are easiest to reuse across SEO settings.
hints.favicon: A square icon works best for browser tabs and bookmarks.
hints.navImage: Use a clean horizontal asset for navigation or branding areas.
hints.icp: Store the full filing number here so launch checks are easier.
hints.publicSecurity: If public security filing applies, keep it alongside the ICP record.
hints.baiduAnalytics: Paste analytics or third-party script snippets here, and keep only the active code.
